hero.title: The home you'll adore
hero.subtitle: Quality properties across Romania — from cozy apartments to family houses, all within your reach.

valueProposition.title: Why Adorys
valueProposition.subtitle: A property platform that works differently.

approach.title: Fewer listings, better vetted
approach.description: Most platforms dump thousands of listings and leave you to figure it out. We're building Adorys around a different idea — a smaller selection of properties, each one reviewed, with someone local to help you through the process.

curated.title: Every listing is reviewed
curated.description: Before a property goes live on Adorys, it goes through our review process. We check the details, flag anything that doesn't add up, and only publish listings we'd be comfortable recommending.

guidance.title: Agents who actually know the city
guidance.description: Our agents live in the cities they cover. They know which neighborhoods are growing, which buildings are well-built, and what a fair price looks like on any given street. That's not something you get from a listing page.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.description: Calculate your monthly payments, compare bank rates, and plan your mortgage with confidence.

purchaseCost.title: Purchase Costs
purchaseCost.description: See the full cost of buying — notary fees, taxes, commissions, and all hidden charges.

rentalYield.title: Rental Yield
rentalYield.description: Estimate your return on investment, net yield, and monthly cash flow from rental properties.

borrowingCapacity.title: Borrowing Capacity
borrowingCapacity.description: Find out how much you can borrow based on your income and existing debts.

0.question: What is Adorys and how can it help me?
0.answer: Adorys is a real estate platform focused on affordable, quality properties across Romania. We help buyers find carefully curated homes priced up to €999,999, with transparent listings and expert agent support throughout the process.

1.question: What types of properties can I find on Adorys?
1.answer: You can find apartments, houses, villas, terrains, penthouses, and more. We cover a wide range of property types across multiple cities in Romania, all within the affordable price segment.

2.question: In which cities are properties available?
2.answer: We currently feature properties in Cluj-Napoca, Oradea, Timișoara, Brașov, and Sibiu — with more cities being added regularly.

3.question: How does the buying process work through Adorys?
3.answer: Browse our listings, contact our agents for viewings, and get guided support through the entire purchase process including documentation, negotiations, and closing. Our agents are here to make it seamless.

4.question: Are Adorys listings verified?
4.answer: Yes. Every property listed on Adorys goes through a review process. We verify ownership, accuracy of descriptions, and ensure photos accurately represent the property.

5.question: Is it free to use Adorys as a buyer?
5.answer: Absolutely. Browsing properties, contacting agents, and scheduling viewings is completely free for buyers. There are no hidden fees or registration requirements.

0.question: What is Adorys and how can it help me?
0.answer: Adorys is a real estate platform focused on affordable, quality properties across Romania. We help buyers find carefully curated homes priced up to €999,999, with transparent listings and expert agent support throughout the process.

1.question: What types of properties can I find on Adorys?
1.answer: You can find apartments, houses, villas, terrains, penthouses, and more. We cover a wide range of property types across multiple cities in Romania, all within the affordable price segment.

2.question: In which cities are properties available?
2.answer: We currently feature properties in Cluj-Napoca, Oradea, Timișoara, Brașov, and Sibiu — with more cities being added regularly.

3.question: How does the buying process work through Adorys?
3.answer: Browse our listings, contact our agents for viewings, and get guided support through the entire purchase process including documentation, negotiations, and closing. Our agents are here to make it seamless.

4.question: Are Adorys listings verified?
4.answer: Yes. Every property listed on Adorys goes through a review process. We verify ownership, accuracy of descriptions, and ensure photos accurately represent the property.

5.question: Is it free to use Adorys as a buyer?
5.answer: Absolutely. Browsing properties, contacting agents, and scheduling viewings is completely free for buyers. There are no hidden fees or registration requirements.

6.question: Can I schedule a property viewing online?
6.answer: Yes! You can request a viewing directly from any property listing page. Our agents will confirm the appointment and guide you through the visit.

7.question: How do I contact an agent?
7.answer: You can reach our agents through the contact form on any property page, via the inquiry modal, or by visiting our Agents page to find a specialist in your preferred city.

8.question: Does Adorys offer properties for rent?
8.answer: Currently, Adorys focuses on properties for sale. We are considering expanding to rentals in the future — stay tuned for updates.

9.question: What documents do I need to buy a property?
9.answer: Typically you'll need a valid ID, proof of income or financing, and funds for the down payment. Our agents will guide you through all required documentation specific to your situation.

cta.subtitle: Our team is happy to help with any questions you may have.

hero.title: Building the Path to Your Home in Romania
hero.description: Adorys connects you with quality, affordable properties across Romania's most vibrant cities. No inflated prices, no hidden fees — just honest real estate for real people.

story.title: Why We Started Adorys
story.paragraph1: We saw a problem that too many families in Romania were facing: a housing market full of overpriced listings, misleading photos, and agents who cared more about commission than finding the right fit. Good homes existed, but finding them felt like searching for a needle in a haystack.
story.paragraph2: Adorys was born from a simple idea — what if there was a platform that only listed quality properties at fair prices, backed by agents who actually know the neighborhoods? We started in Cluj-Napoca and grew to cover Brașov, Sibiu, Oradea, and Timișoara. Every property on Adorys is reviewed before it goes live, because we believe you deserve to trust what you see.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: These aren't just words on a page. They shape every decision we make, every property we list, and every family we help.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear pricing with no hidden costs. Honest descriptions that match reality. Real photos, real floor plans, and verified ownership. We believe trust starts with telling the truth.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Quality living shouldn't require a luxury budget. We focus exclusively on properties that offer genuine value — comfortable, well-built homes in great locations at prices that make sense.

community.title: Community
community.description: A home is more than four walls. We care about the neighborhoods, the schools nearby, the local cafes and parks. We help you find not just a property, but a place where your family belongs.

support.title: Support
support.description: From your first search to the day you get your keys, our local agents walk alongside you. Questions about financing, paperwork, or neighborhoods — we're a message away.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Finding your home through Adorys is straightforward. Three steps, no surprises.

browse.title: Browse & Discover
browse.description: Search by city, budget, or neighborhood. Filter by what matters to you — every listing is verified and photographed.

connect.title: Connect with an Agent
connect.description: Our local agents know every street. Schedule viewings, ask questions, and get honest advice tailored to your needs.

moveIn.title: Move In
moveIn.description: From offer to keys, we handle the complexity. Documentation, negotiations, and closing — all guided by your agent.

cities.title: Across Romania
cities.subtitle: From university hubs to historic gems, we cover the cities where life is good and property makes sense.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Home?
cta.subtitle: Browse our collection of verified properties or reach out — we're here to help you every step of the way.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: Transilvania Grand SRL is the data controller for the Adorys platform. We process your personal data under the GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679) and Romanian Law 190/2018, solely to provide real-estate brokerage services. This page summarises what we collect, how we use it, and the rights you have.

collect.title: What we collect
collect.body: We collect only the data we need to deliver our services, within the bounds of GDPR Article 6(1): name, surname, national ID number (CNP) and ID card series/number to enter into the viewing or brokerage contract; phone number and email for communication and scheduling; information about your property interest (specific property, indicative budget, area preferences) to tailor offers; and the URL of the page you submitted the form from, for context. We do not collect sensitive data and we do not perform automated profiling.

use.title: How we use it
use.body: We use your data solely to respond to your inquiry and to provide the brokerage service. We may share it, only to the extent strictly necessary, with: the owner of the property being negotiated, a notary public for drafting the deed, our accountant and lawyer for legal obligations, and our IT infrastructure providers (hosting, email, CRM), with whom we hold data processing agreements signed under GDPR Article 28. We do not sell or rent your data to anyone. For protection we use in-transit encryption (HTTPS), hashed passwords, two-factor authentication for administrative access, and need-to-know access controls.

retention.title: How long we keep it
retention.body: Inquiries that do not result in a transaction are kept for 120 days from the last interaction, plus a 30-day buffer for archival, after which they are permanently deleted. Completed transactions are kept for 3 years for tax purposes, with related accounting documents retained for 10 years as required by the Romanian Fiscal Code. Marketing communications (with explicit consent) are retained until consent is withdrawn.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Under the GDPR you have the right, free of charge, to: access the data we hold about you, have inaccurate data corrected, request deletion where no legal basis for retention remains, restrict or object to processing, receive your data in a portable format, and withdraw marketing consent at any time. We respond to requests within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Romanian data protection authority (ANSPDCP — dataprotection.ro, B-dul G-ral Gheorghe Magheru 28-30, Bucharest).

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any privacy-related question or to exercise your rights, contact privacy@adorys.ro. Data controller: Transilvania Grand SRL, fiscal code 39607580, registered with the Trade Register under no. J01/631/2018, registered office at Str. Libertății 5, bl. L4, et. 3, ap. 10, Câmpeni 515500, Alba County, Romania.

processors.title: Third-party processors
processors.body: To deliver our services we rely on a small number of trusted providers who process data on our behalf under data-processing agreements concluded in accordance with GDPR Article 28: Resend (transactional email delivery); Fly.io (application hosting, in the EU / Amsterdam region); Cloudflare R2 (secure file and image storage); and Google (sign-in for our staff and agents only). Each may process your data solely to provide its service to us. We do not sell or rent your data to anyone.

meta.title: Useful Tools — Property Calculators
meta.description: Free property calculators for mortgage payments, purchase costs, rental yield, and borrowing capacity. Plan your property investment in Romania with confidence.

hero.title: Useful Tools
hero.subtitle: Free calculators and guides to help you make informed property decisions.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.description: Calculate monthly payments, total interest, and compare Romanian bank rates. Plan your mortgage with a detailed amortization schedule.

purchaseCost.title: Purchase Cost Calculator
purchaseCost.description: See the full cost of buying property in Romania — notary fees, land registry, agent commission, stamp duty, and legal fees.

rentalYield.title: Rental Yield Calculator
rentalYield.description: Estimate gross and net rental yield, monthly cash flow, and payback period for your investment property.

borrowingCapacity.title: Borrowing Capacity Calculator
borrowingCapacity.description: Find out the maximum you can borrow based on your income, existing debts, and Romanian banking regulations.

guidesSection.title: Guides & Articles
guidesSection.subtitle: In-depth guides and market insights to help you navigate the Romanian property market.

ToolsPage.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates and do not constitute financial advice. Actual amounts may vary. Consult a financial advisor for personalized guidance.
ToolsPage.eurRonDisclaimer: Notary fees calculated using an approximate exchange rate of 1 EUR = 4.97 RON. Actual rates may vary.

meta.title: Mortgage Calculator — Monthly Payments & Amortization
meta.description: Calculate your mortgage monthly payments, total interest, and view the full amortization schedule. Compare Romanian bank rates.

mortgage.title: Mortgage Calculator
mortgage.subtitle: Calculate monthly payments, total interest, and plan your mortgage with Romanian bank rates.

meta.title: Purchase Cost Calculator — Full Buying Costs in Romania
meta.description: Calculate the full cost of buying property in Romania including notary fees, land registry, agent commission, and legal fees.

purchaseCost.title: Purchase Cost Calculator
purchaseCost.subtitle: See every cost involved in buying property in Romania — no hidden surprises.
purchaseCost.notaryFeeInfo: Based on Romanian notary fee brackets, calculated in RON and converted to EUR.
purchaseCost.landRegistryInfo: Approximately 0.15% of property value for land book registration.
purchaseCost.agentCommissionInfo: Standard real estate agent fee, typically 2-3% of property price.
purchaseCost.stampDutyInfo: Fixed administrative fees for document processing.
purchaseCost.legalFeesInfo: Estimated cost for legal representation during the purchase process.
purchaseCost.feesPercent: Additional costs represent {percent} of the property price

meta.title: Rental Yield Calculator — ROI for Investment Properties
meta.description: Calculate gross and net rental yield, monthly cash flow, and payback period for investment properties in Romania.

rentalYield.title: Rental Yield Calculator
rentalYield.subtitle: Estimate your return on investment for rental properties in Romania.
rentalYield.annualExpensesInfo: Include maintenance, property tax, insurance, and management fees.

meta.title: Borrowing Capacity Calculator — How Much Can You Borrow
meta.description: Calculate the maximum mortgage you can afford based on your income, debts, and Romanian banking regulations (40% DTI rule).

borrowingCapacity.title: Borrowing Capacity Calculator
borrowingCapacity.subtitle: Find out how much you can borrow based on Romanian banking regulations.
borrowingCapacity.existingDebtsInfo: Include car loans, credit cards, and other monthly debt payments.
borrowingCapacity.dependentsInfo: Spouse, children, or other persons you support financially.
borrowingCapacity.nouaCasaInfo: Government-backed mortgage program. Max property: €70,000. Down payment: 5% (new build) / 15% (existing).
borrowingCapacity.nouaCasaExceeds: Property exceeds Noua Casă €70,000 limit — capped.
borrowingCapacity.insuranceInfo: Banks require life insurance (~0.05% of balance/month). This reduces your borrowing capacity slightly.
borrowingCapacity.ratesFallback: Using estimated rates. Live rates currently unavailable.
borrowingCapacity.totalMonthlyCostInfo: Including mortgage payment, insurance and property insurance.
borrowingCapacity.dtiExplainer: Romanian regulations (BNR) limit total monthly debt payments to 40% of net income.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Adorys website. By accessing or using the site you agree to these terms. If you do not agree with them, please do not use the site.

acceptance.title: Acceptance and operator
acceptance.body: The Adorys website is operated by Transilvania Grand SRL, a company registered in Romania (fiscal code 39607580, Trade Register no. J01/631/2018), with its registered office at Str. Libertății 5, bl. L4, et. 3, ap. 10, Câmpeni 515500, Alba County. By browsing or otherwise using the site you confirm that you accept these terms and have the legal capacity to enter into them.

use.title: Use of the site
use.body: You may use the site only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You agree not to use the site in any way that breaches applicable law, attempt to gain unauthorised access to the site or its servers, scrape or harvest content by automated means without our consent, or interfere with the site's normal operation or security.

listings.title: Listings and information
listings.body: Property listings, prices, availability, descriptions and images are provided for general information only and may change at any time without notice. They do not constitute a binding offer, a contract or professional advice. We make reasonable efforts to keep the information accurate but cannot guarantee that it is complete or current — please confirm any detail with us before relying on it.

intermediary.title: Our role as intermediary
intermediary.body: Transilvania Grand SRL acts as a real-estate intermediary. The website helps you discover properties and get in touch with us; it does not itself conclude any sale, lease or brokerage. Any transaction is governed by a separate written contract signed between the parties, whose terms prevail over these website terms.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: All content on the site — including text, design, logos and trademarks — is owned by or licensed to Transilvania Grand SRL. Some photographs are used under Creative Commons licences, with attributions listed at /image-credits.txt. You may not reproduce or use site content for commercial purposes without our prior written consent or, for licensed images, beyond the terms of the applicable licence.

liability.title: Disclaimer and liability
liability.body: The site is provided "as is", without warranties of any kind. To the fullest extent permitted by Romanian law, we are not liable for any indirect or consequential loss arising from your use of, or inability to use, the site. Nothing in these terms limits your mandatory statutory rights as a consumer.

thirdParty.title: Third-party links
thirdParty.body: The site may contain links to third-party websites that we do not control. We are not responsible for their content, accuracy or privacy practices, and the presence of a link does not imply endorsement.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: We process personal data as described in our Privacy Policy, which forms part of these terms.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time. The version published on this page, bearing the date shown above, is the one in force. Continued use of the site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

law.title: Governing law and disputes
law.body: These terms are governed by Romanian law, and any dispute will be submitted to the competent Romanian courts. If you are a consumer, you may also pursue out-of-court resolution through the National Authority for Consumer Protection (ANPC, anpc.ro) or the European Commission's online dispute resolution platform at ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at contact@adorys.ro.

CookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
CookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how the Adorys website uses cookies and similar technologies.

what.title: What cookies are
what.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make sites work, or work more efficiently, and to remember your preferences.

essential.title: Cookies we use
essential.body: We use only strictly necessary cookies — those required for the site to function. These include a cookie that remembers your chosen language (NEXT_LOCALE) and cookies that keep your session secure. We do not use analytics, advertising or third-party tracking cookies, and we do not build profiles of your browsing.

control.title: Managing cookies
control.body: You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings, and configure your browser to block them. Because the cookies we use are essential, blocking them may cause parts of the site to stop working correctly.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this policy if our use of cookies changes. The date shown above indicates when it was last revised.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any question about this policy, contact us at privacy@adorys.ro.
